title: helichrysum psychrophilum
intro: Helichrysum psychrophilum, also known as the mountain everlast, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The plant is rich in essential oils with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in traditional medicine. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving circulation, as well as having antioxidant and antiseptic properties that can aid in wound healing and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Helichrysum psychrophilum include essential oil extracts and infusions, which can be used in aromatherapy, topical applications, and teas for various medicinal purposes.
